TH_SANAE-FAKE_FAITH.title: Faded Faith
TH_SANAE-FAKE_FAITH.description:
At the start and end of each combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
Each time you defeat a [purple]BOSS[/purple]/[red]Elite[/red], this count increases by [blue]3[/blue].
TH_SANAE-FAKE_FAITH.flavor: The embodiment of Moriya Shrine's faith, now faded from its original luster, but still offering Sanae some protection.
TH_SANAE-TRUE_FAITH.title: Prosperous Faith
TH_SANAE-TRUE_FAITH.description:
At the start and end of your turn, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
Each time you defeat a [purple]BOSS[/purple]/[red]Elite[/red], this count increases by [blue]3[/blue].
TH_SANAE-TRUE_FAITH.flavor: The embodiment of Moriya Shrine's faith, restored to its former glory through Sanae's efforts.
TH_SANAE-MYSTERY_FRUIT_RELIC.title: Miracle Fruit
TH_SANAE-MYSTERY_FRUIT_RELIC.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-MYSTERY_FRUIT_RELIC.flavor: A fruit with the ability to turn anything sour in the world sweet.
TH_SANAE-AYA_NEWS.title: Bunbunmaru Newspaper
TH_SANAE-AYA_NEWS.description: At the start of each combat, add a random [gold]Colorless[/gold] card to your hand.
TH_SANAE-AYA_NEWS.flavor: A newspaper written from material gathered by Aya Shameimaru. Produced and published irregularly; as it's made by a single person, its content is highly biased.
TH_SANAE-HINA_FOLLOW.title: Hina the Misfortune God
TH_SANAE-HINA_FOLLOW.description: Whenever you draw a [purple]Curse[/purple] card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it, then draw [blue]1[/blue] card and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-HINA_FOLLOW.flavor: Hina Kagiyama now travels with you.
TH_SANAE-CHEWING_WINE.title: Wind Priestess Chewing Wine
TH_SANAE-CHEWING_WINE.description:
[gold]Right-click this relic[/gold] to immediately gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Automatically replenished when entering a [gold]Rest Site[/gold].
TH_SANAE-CHEWING_WINE.flavor: Chewing wine personally made by Sanae. This is premium "imported" goods (laughs).
TH_SANAE-ITEM_P.title: Power Point
TH_SANAE-ITEM_P.description:
Your [gold]Strike[/gold] cards deal [blue]{Percent}[/blue]% more damage.
[gold]Right-click this relic[/gold] to consume [blue]1[/blue] count and deal [blue]10[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
When an enemy dies, increase count by [blue]1[/blue]/[red]2[/red]/[purple]3[/purple] ([blue]Normal[/blue]/[red]Elite[/red]/[purple]BOSS[/purple]).
When you lose HP, halve the count.
Maximum count: [blue]5[/blue].
TH_SANAE-ITEM_P.flavor: An item that increases firepower as you defeat enemies, but decreases when you take damage.
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_KANAKO.title: Shattered Mirror of Truth
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_KANAKO.description: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Kanako card[/gold] to your hand, and apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies that do not intend to attack.
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_KANAKO.flavor: Kanako's Mirror of Truth has shattered. Now only Suwako remains at Moriya.
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_SUWAKO.title: Damaged Mishaguji Iron Ring
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_SUWAKO.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card with Energy cost no greater than [blue]1[/blue], play it 1 additional time.
TH_SANAE-BROKEN_PART_SUWAKO.flavor: Suwako's iron ring has corroded and broken. Now only Kanako remains at Moriya.
TH_SANAE-FULL_MORIYA_SHRINE.title: Perfect Moriya Shrine
TH_SANAE-FULL_MORIYA_SHRINE.description:
Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, play it 1 additional time.
At the start of your turn, add [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Kanako cards[/gold] to your hand with 0 cost before first play this turn, and apply [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies that do not intend to attack.
TH_SANAE-FULL_MORIYA_SHRINE.flavor: Sanae stopped the conflict between the two. Moriya's twin gods remain — yet another chapter in history.
TH_SANAE-FROG_TALISMAN.title: Safe Return Frog Talisman
TH_SANAE-FROG_TALISMAN.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Single-Layer Plating[/gold].
TH_SANAE-FROG_TALISMAN.flavor: A popular talisman from Moriya Shrine, from Suwako. With this, you will return home safely.
TH_SANAE-SNAKE_TALISMAN.title: Snake-Shed Talisman
TH_SANAE-SNAKE_TALISMAN.description:
At the start of each combat, gain [blue]8[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Thereafter, at the start of your turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SNAKE_TALISMAN.flavor: From Yasaka Kanako. It's said that carrying this talisman grants physical strength.
TH_SANAE-BAND_AID.title: Wind Priestess Band-Aid
TH_SANAE-BAND_AID.flavor: A band-aid blessed by Moriya Shrine, with extraordinary healing properties.
TH_SANAE-BOOK_OF_MORIYA.title: Moriya Secret Codex
TH_SANAE-BOOK_OF_MORIYA.description:
Your [gold]Chant[/gold] turns required are reduced by [blue]2[/blue].
When you [gold]Chant[/gold], randomly gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] or [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_SANAE-BOOK_OF_MORIYA.flavor: A book recording Moriya's traditions, including lost secret arts no longer passed down orally.
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.title: Changed Timeline
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.description: At the start of your turn, discard up to [blue]{Count}[/blue] cards, then choose an equal number of cards from your [gold]discard pile[/gold] to return to your hand.
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.flavor: Something seems to have changed in the unseen...
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.selectionScre: Select up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards to discard.
TH_SANAE-CHANGED_TIME_LINE.returnSelecti: Select [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards to return to your hand.
TH_SANAE-HINA_NINGYOU.title: Nagashi-bina Doll
TH_SANAE-HINA_NINGYOU.description: [gold]Right-click this relic[/gold] to release the doll, removing and [gold]Exhaust[/gold]ing all [purple]Curse[/purple] and [red]Status[/red] cards from your [gold]deck[/gold].
TH_SANAE-HINA_NINGYOU.flavor: Send the Hina doll down the river, and your misfortune will be carried away with it — this is Hina-matsuri.
TH_SANAE-GONE_HINA_NINGYOU.title: Ashes of the Hina Doll
TH_SANAE-GONE_HINA_NINGYOU.description: This relic's power has been depleted... but perhaps it has other uses?
TH_SANAE-GONE_HINA_NINGYOU.flavor: After absorbing your misfortune, it burst into flames and turned into these ashes.
TH_SANAE-SOURCE_OF_HUMAN_GOD.title: Essence of the Living God
TH_SANAE-SOURCE_OF_HUMAN_GOD.description:
At the start of your turn, each [gold]Devotee[/gold] gives you {Energy:energyIcons()} and draws [blue]1[/blue] card.
At the end of your turn, [gold]Persuade[/gold] all enemies.
If there are no [gold]Devotees[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold], and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
TH_SANAE-SOURCE_OF_HUMAN_GOD.flavor: As a god, losing faith means losing power — and vice versa.
TH_SANAE-AYA_FOLLOW.title: Wind God Girl
TH_SANAE-AYA_FOLLOW.description: When gaining [gold]Wind Force[/gold], gain [blue]2[/blue] times as much.
TH_SANAE-AYA_FOLLOW.flavor: Aya Shameimaru now travels with you.
TH_SANAE-HECATIA_T_SHIRT.title: A Certain God's T-Shirt
TH_SANAE-HECATIA_T_SHIRT.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Frail[/gold], then gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_SANAE-HECATIA_T_SHIRT.flavor: "Sanae, after abandoning unnecessary shame, you are now strong." — Hecatia
